docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CONTRERAS, VICTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DELEON, VINICIO $4,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,050.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY APPELLANT DELEON, VINICIO MAILED TO RESPONDENT CONTRERAS, VICTOR
MINI-MINUTES FOR AUG-04-2011 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 414

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT CONTRERAS, VICTOR RECOVER FROM APPELLANT DELEON, VINICIO $4,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,050.00, DEFENDANT PROMISED TO CARRY AND DELIVER THE CARGO TO THE PLAINTIFF AT THE DESTINATION FOR A FEE INCLUSIVE OF CUSTOMS DUTIES AND TAXES. PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT DELEON, VINICIO
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-27-2011 DEPT. 506, JUDGE DONALD MITCHELL; CLERK: S. RAVINANTAPRICHA; NOT REPORTED. PARTIES PRESENT, MATTER WAS HEARD, ARGUED AND TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION. NO EXHIBIT.
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, RECORD TRANSFERRED
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER FILED BY DELEON, VINICIO CONTRERAS, VICTOR
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-27-2011 - JUDGMENT.
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE HEARING SET FOR AUG-04-2011 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 414
RECORD REMANDED TO SMALL CLAIMS (EXHIBITS RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-01-2014 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,000.00 FILED BY CONTRERAS, VICTOR AS TO DEFENDANT DELEON, VINICIO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-27-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF AUG-04-2011 - JUDGMENT ENTERED. APPEARANCES BY BOTH THE APPELLANT AND THE RESPONDENT. JPT ELLIOTT MYLES. CLERK: A. PASCUAL. NOT REPORTED. (414). EXHIBITS RETAINED.
ADDED TO EXHIBIT DESTRUCTION REPORT OF AUG-01-2014

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-04-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:15am

Judge Pro Tem Elliot Myles, clerk - Annie Pascual, nothing on record, dept. 414
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellants, Vinicio DeLeon present in pro per. Sindy Soto interprets English/Spanish and Spanish/English on behalf of the Appellant. Respondent, Victor Contreras present in pro per. Respondent Manuel Contreras present in pro per (from CSM-11-836929 heard concurrently). Parties previously sworn, and testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles.

EXRA: Reciept w/destination address, Reciepts with work order and list of items, copy of check and invoices, Spanish letter w/translations, reciept with shipment payment; collectively marked.
EXA1: Spanish letters, reciepts, translation of contract

9:51AM
Exhibits Retained. Case submitted.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jun-06-2011 Judgment Entered
